debug_info.goal:
L : Logic ℕ
φ ψ χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
inst✝ : Entailment.F L
hφψ : φ ⋎ ψ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
hφ : φ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
hψ : ψ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
left✝¹ : χ ➝ φ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)
hΓ₁ : ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode φ)
hΓ₂ : Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
left✝ : χ ➝ ψ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
Δ : Finset (Formula ℕ)
hΔ₁ : ↑Δ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode ψ)
hΔ₂ : Δ.conj ⋏ ψ ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
m : ℕ := max (encode φ) (encode ψ)
⊢ ↑(Γ ∪ Δ) ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT m

failed_attempts:
intro δ hδ
    simp at hδ
    rcases hδ with (hδ | hδ)
    · have h2 : δ ∈ (construction T hT (encode φ)) := by
        apply hΓ₁
        exact hδ
      have h3 : δ ∈ (construction T hT m) := by
        have h4 : (encode φ) ≤ m := by
          simp [m]
          all_goals omega
        have h5 : (construction T hT (encode φ)) ⊆ (construction T hT m) := by
          apply subset_construction_add
        exact h5 h2
      exact h3
    · have h2 : δ ∈ (construction T hT (encode ψ)) := by
        apply hΔ₁
        exact hδ
      have h3 : δ ∈ (construction T hT m) := by
        have h4 : (encode ψ) ≤ m := by
          simp [m]
          all_goals omega
        have h5 : (construction T hT (encode ψ)) ⊆ (construction T hT m) := by
          apply subset_construction_add
        exact h5 h2
      exact h3

  have h3 : φ ∈ (construction_omega T hT) := by
    have h4 : φ ∈ (↑(Γ ∪ Δ)) := by
      simp [hφ, hψ] at *
      tauto
    have h5 : φ ∈ (construction_omega T hT) := by
      apply h1
      exact h4
    exact h5
  contradiction
